mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_project WHERE (proj_req_biznum = #{companyData.cmpy_biznum} OR proj_acp_biznum = #{companyData.cmpy_biznum})
AND ${pageData.searchType} like '%'||#{pageData.searchKeyword}||'%'

SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_project
WHERE bnc_project.${searchType} like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
mapper.update: UPDATE bnc_project SET proj_acp_phone = #{prpl_acp_phone}, proj_acp_biznum = #{prpl_acp_biznum}, proj_flag = 'C' WHERE proj_number = #{prpl_number}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bnc_project_participate_list pplist, bnc_company company WHERE pplist.prpl_acp_biznum = company.cmpy_biznum AND pplist.prpl_number = #{projectNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bnc_project_participate_list ( prpl_number, prpl_acp_biznum, prpl_acp_price, prpl_acp_phone, prpl_file_path, prpl_file_name, prpl_rdate ) VALUES( #{prpl_number}, #{prpl_acp_biznum}, #{prpl_acp_price}, #{prpl_acp_phone}, #{prpl_file_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prpl_file_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss') )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bnc_company company, bnc_project project WHERE company.cmpy_biznum = project.proj_req_biznum AND project.proj_number = #{projectNumber}
mapper.update:
UPDATE bnc_project
SET proj_name = #{proj_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_kind = #{proj_kind, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_req_phone = #{proj_req_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_acp_phone = #{proj_acp_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_acp_biznum = #{proj_acp_biznum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_mov_url = #{proj_mov_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_keyword = #{proj_keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_lead_time = #{proj_lead_time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_flag = #{proj_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_price_range = #{proj_price_range, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_thumb_file_path = #{proj_thumb_file_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_contents = #{proj_contents, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_req_flag = #{proj_req_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proj_acp_flag = #{proj_acp_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
proj_udate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss')
where proj_number = #{proj_number}
mapper.insert:
select bnc_project_seq.nextval from dual
insert into BNC_PROJECT ( proj_number, proj_name, proj_kind, proj_req_phone, proj_req_biznum, proj_acp_phone, proj_acp_biznum, proj_mov_url, proj_keyword, proj_lead_time, proj_flag, proj_price_range, proj_thumb_file_path, proj_contents, proj_rdate, proj_udate ) values ( #{proj_number}, #{proj_name}, #{proj_kind}, #{proj_req_phone}, #{proj_req_biznum}, #{proj_acp_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proj_acp_biznum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proj_mov_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proj_keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proj_lead_time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'W', #{proj_price_range}, #{proj_thumb_file_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proj_contents}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'), TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss') )
insert into bnc_project_file (prof_seq, prof_proj_number, prof_file_path, prof_file_name) values(bnc_project_file_seq.nextval, #{prof_proj_number}, #{prof_file_path}, #{prof_file_name})
